content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market positive with Pharma (+2.04%), Auto (+0.97%), PSU Bank (+1.05%), and IT (+0.75%) leading. VIX easing -2.96%. Global cues supportive (Nasdaq +1.03%). Earnings season delivering strong prints across the book (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR, COFORGE, M&M, ABCAPITAL all bullish). Book is already 60% deployed across 11 names — focus this tick is position management and SL trailing, not stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.3%, well into profit. Current SL 1035 is now ABOVE CMP 1046.50 (only 1.1% below) — trail-gap discipline says SL must sit ≥1% below LTP to avoid self-stopout on intraday noise. CMP fading from 1062 high to 1046; setting SL to 1025 (~2.1% below CMP) preserves +4% locked-in gain while giving room for normal chop. Q4 PAT +19% YoY, sub-1% GNPA, sector tailwind from RBI cuts intact. Target 1110 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%, recovering today (+1.32%). SL 119 = ~4% below CMP, well-placed. Defensive hedge against Iran/macro tail risk. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9% at all-time high zone (CMP 1733 vs ATH 1748). Current SL 1715 is ABOVE CMP — self-stopout risk. Tightening to 1710 (~1.4% below CMP) — still locks in +0.6% gain, and preserves trail-gap discipline. April cargo +15% YoY supports thesis; Elara downgrade and promoter stake sale are overhangs that justify not loosening. Target 1800 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, CMP 206.72 vs SL 206. SL is essentially being tested. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2% best-in-class, asset quality improving. Banking sector green +0.85%. Letting the original SL do its job — if 206 breaks, position exits cleanly; if it holds, the bullish thesis re-asserts. No edge in moving SL closer; can't loosen it."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%. Current SL at entry (4575) — at +2% trigger per trailing mandate, tighten to breakeven+ at 4595 (~1.3% below CMP 4657, within trail-gap discipline). Defence sector tailwind, new CMD catalyst. Q4 results May 14 is a binary catalyst within ~5 sessions — not yet within 3-session window but flag for next tick. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9%. SL 6950 is ~1.1% below CMP 7028 — already at trail-gap threshold; tightening further would risk self-stopout on a name with strong Q4 (PAT +124% YoY) and 34.2% EBITDA margin. Holding current SL. Geojit Rs 8,500 target supports continued upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.2%. SL 825 = ~1.3% below CMP 834, within discipline. Wagon basket strong but stock retraced from 862 high. Letting setup play out; cannot loosen SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%. Strong Q4 (PAT +30% YoY), Motilal target Rs 325 raised. SL 358 = ~2% below CMP 365. Letting thesis play. Stock at 52-wk-high zone — momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%. SL 812 = ~2% below CMP 828. EBITDA margin pressure from copra is the overhang; holding SL where it is given Street's lukewarm reaction post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%. CMP 3266 vs SL 3245 = ~0.6% buffer. Q4 PAT +42% YoY, dividend Rs 33. Stock made high 3315 then faded to 3266 — normal chop. Letting SL stand."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1248.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%, CMP 1278.80 vs SL 1230 = ~3.8% gap. Q4 blowout (PAT +145% QoQ, revenue +30% YoY). Tightening SL to 1248 (~2.4% below CMP) — locks in roughly breakeven minus minor cost while keeping room for post-earnings volatility. Target 1330 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY MIS @133.50 placed 418m ago — let it sit / expire. Per ORDER HYGIENE rule, do not stack. Not adding new entry on this name."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up but maintain ≥1% gap below CMP to avoid self-stopout. Locks in ~+4% from entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL well-placed at -4% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 1715 (above CMP — self-stopout risk) to 1710 (1.4% below CMP). Preserves +0.6% locked gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 206 being tested by CMP 206.72. Original thesis intact; let SL execute if breached."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven+ at +2% unrealized trigger; preserves trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1.1% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Further tightening risks self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1.3% below CMP, appropriate given retracement from intraday high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position fresh, post-Q4 strong; SL at 2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at -2% from CMP appropriate; margin pressure overhang justifies not tightening further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL has ~0.6% buffer; in normal intraday chop range. Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1248.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 1230 to 1248 (~2.4% below CMP) while preserving room for post-earnings volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LALPATHLAB (11.4x volume, hit 20% UC May 4, brokerage upgrades) and CAMS (post-Q4 +10.6% gap) remain interesting but already extended; would prefer to see consolidation before entry. SRF, AUROPHARMA, BIOCON, AJANTPHARM all in extended pharma rally — wait for pullback rather than chase. PNB / VEDL / HFCL (already has open MIS order) on watch. CHENNPETRO-style chase-and-bail pattern actively avoided.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed across 11 names with strong sector diversification (Financials, FMCG, Defence, Auto, IT, Chemicals, Logistics, Banking, Gold ETF). No single sector >20% of capital. Cash 40% provides ample headroom; soft target of 80% deployed not stretched to. Priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs on the four winners (PNBHOUSING +6.3%, ADANIPORTS +1.9%, NAVINFLUOR +1.9%, HAL +1.8%, COFORGE +1.6%) where trail-gap discipline allows. HAL has Q4 results May 14 — flag for binary-event discipline next session (within 3-day window). No new entries this tick: existing book has the day's bullish themes well-expressed; stacking more correlated names (more Pharma, more Defence, more Capital Goods) would breach cluster discipline."
}
